seoTitle: Henderson County Schools KY Calendar 2025-2026 | Holidays, Breaks & Important Dates
seoDescription: View Henderson County Schools KY Calendar 2025-2026 with first day, last day, holidays, fall break, winter break, spring break dates, PDF and calendar download options.
calendarNotes: Henderson County Schools in Kentucky starts the 2025-2026 school year on August 7, 2025 and ends on May 19, 2026. Fall Break runs October 6-10, Winter Break runs December 22-January 2, and Spring Break runs April 6-10. The calendar also lists professional development days, extended learning days, holidays, possible make-up days, closing day for staff, and school hours.

calendarFaqs.q: When does Henderson County Schools start school in 2025?
calendarFaqs.a: The first day for students is Thursday, August 7, 2025.

calendarFaqs.q: When is Henderson County Schools Spring Break in 2026?
calendarFaqs.a: Spring Break runs Monday, April 6 through Friday, April 10, 2026.

calendarFaqs.q: When is the last day of school for Henderson County Schools in 2026?
calendarFaqs.a: The last day for students is Tuesday, May 19, 2026.

calendarFaqs.q: Which Henderson County Schools is this?
calendarFaqs.a: This is Henderson County Schools in Kentucky, not Henderson County Public Schools in North Carolina.

yearNumbers.label: First Day
